headline: Amazon speeds up deliveries in L.A. and elsewhere with one-hour option
summary: The e-commerce giant said customers will have the option to get items delivered in three hours or less if they pay a fee.

raw.headline: Amazon speeds up deliveries in L.A. and elsewhere with one-hour option

headline: Coatue and NFX Alums Launch Catalyst by Outcast Ventures, Redefining How Companies Get Founded
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 17, 2026--Today, Andy Chen and Amy Lin, Coatue and NFX alums, respectively, announced Catalyst by Outcast Ventures.

headline: Sands Capital Closes Oversubscribed Global Innovation Fund III
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 17, 2026--Sands Capital today announced the successful closing of Global Innovation Fund III, raising $1.1 billion.

raw.headline: Sands Capital Closes Oversubscribed Global Innovation Fund III

headline: DoorDash (DASH) Reinforces Growth Strategy Through Continued Reinvestment, Bernstein Reaffirms Outperform
summary: DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) ranks among the best growth stocks to buy and hold for the long term. Following a conference meeting with DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH)’s management, Bernstein SocGen Group reiterated its Outperform rating and $270 price objective for the company on February 27. Analyst Nikhil Devnani joined DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH), VP of Finance and Investor […]

headline: Amazon adds 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options in the US
summary: Amazon Prime subscribers will be charged $9.99 for one-hour delivery and $4.99 for three-hour delivery. If you don't have a Prime subscription, you'll pay $19.99 for one-hour delivery and $14.99 for three-hour delivery.

raw.headline: Amazon adds 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options in the US
raw.summary: Amazon Prime subscribers will be charged $9.99 for one-hour delivery and $4.99 for three-hour delivery. If you don't have a Prime subscription, you'll pay $19.99 for one-hour delivery and $14.99 for three-hour delivery.

headline: Amazon rolls out 1-hour, 3-hour delivery as ultrafast shipping trend grows in the U.S.
summary: Amazon is speeding up deliveries even further after investing significant money and resources to make same-day shipping the standard.

raw.headline: Amazon rolls out 1-hour, 3-hour delivery as ultrafast shipping trend grows in the U.S.
raw.summary: Amazon is speeding up deliveries even further after investing significant money and resources to make same-day shipping the standard.
